title: Get integration details from integration Id
excerpt: Is there any way we can get integration Details with integrationId or Recipe Id

posts.author: yolo (yolo)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way we can get integration Details with integrationId or Recipe Id

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @yolo,

Currently, integration details cannot be gathered from integration IDs or recipe IDs
